User.title: User
User.description: Represents a customer or administrator user profile registered in the system

uid.description: Unique identifier matching the Firebase Authentication UID

email.description: Contact email address of the user

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user

address.description: Delivery address details for microgreen deliveries

role.description: Access control role assigned to the user

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp representing the registration date

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a microgreen culture item available in the botanical greenhouse catalogue

name.description: Name of the microgreen culture (e.g., Rabanete Da Estufa)

description.description: Detailed botanical description, taste details, and culinary instructions

availableWeight.description: Available volume/weight in stock for harvest

unit.description: Unit of configuration for weights or count

pricePerWeight.description: Unit base pricing for microgreen sales

image.description: Image secure web link or symbol preset reference

status.description: Greenhouse market visibility status of the product

saleType.description: Indicates whether the product is sold by weight or by unit

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an active order placement for microgreens

customerId.description: Associated user UID of the placing customer

customerName.description: Name of the customer for immediate identification on invoices

total.description: Sum total of order costs in Brazilian Real currency

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the harvest and consignment order

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp for database ingestion registration

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp representing the most recent status transition

notes.description: Optional instructions regarding delivery or growth preferences

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Real-time alerts triggered by status updates or user actions

recipient.description: Contextual routing target for the notice

customerId.description: Customer UID to fetch targeted notifications or blank for admins

isRead.description: Has the user dismissed/read the notification

AdminMapping.title: AdminMapping
AdminMapping.description: Explicit role check collection to prevent identity spoofing

assignedBy.description: UID of the admin who assigned this role

users/{userId}.description: Stores detailed personal accounts of customers and administrators

products/{productId}.description: Botanical catalogue of active microgreen seeds, growth logs, and prices available

orders/{orderId}.description: Submissions and history tracking records for all harvests and deliveries

notifications/{notifId}.description: Push alerts for operators and clients inside the greenhouse system

admins/{adminId}.description: Strict server-side list of verified administrator UIDs
